div.head: 378. Editorial Note
div.p: On August 30 the National Security Council at its 295th meeting discussed the question of United States policy in Southeast Asia with particular reference to NSC 5612, August 15, “U.S. Policy in Mainland Southeast Asia”. Laos was among the topics in the NSC paper and among the topics discussed at the NSC meeting. Both the memorandum of discussion at the NSC meeting and NSC 5612/1, September 5, are printed as Documents 118 and 119.
